## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python -m pytest`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd frontend && npm test`)
- [ ] Frontend lints clean (`cd frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
